_comment: Registry of canonical deep-template assets. `vars` are ${name} substitutions (project_slug is required everywhere it appears; slug_upper and pkg are derived from it automatically). `flags` gate #IF/#ELIF/#ELSE/#ENDIF blocks; unlisted flags default to false. Bicep assets deliberately absent: Azure IaC comes from the dedicated Bicep MCP server integration.

docker-python.description: Hardened multi-stage Python Dockerfile: uv frozen sync, digest-pinned base, non-root UID 10001, tini PID 1, stdlib healthcheck, pip stripped from runtime.

docker-rust.description: Hardened multi-stage Rust Dockerfile: cargo --locked release build, digest-pinned base, non-root UID 10001, tini PID 1, binary healthcheck subcommand.

compose.description: Dev compose with prod-parity hardening: read-only rootfs, no-new-privileges, cap_drop ALL, tmpfs /tmp, localhost-only port binding, resource limits.

dockerignore.description: Minimal-context .dockerignore: excludes VCS, secrets, envs, build artifacts, tests, docs, IaC, SBOMs.

ci-python.description: SHA-pinned CI for Python: ruff/mypy/pytest matrix, frontmatter + logic-ref gates, bandit, pip-audit, SBOM, detect-secrets, gitleaks; container gates behind `containerized`, Bicep gates behind `azure`.

ci-rust.description: SHA-pinned CI for Rust: fmt/clippy/build/test --locked, governance binaries, cargo-audit/deny, SBOM, detect-secrets, gitleaks; container gates behind `containerized`, Bicep gates behind `azure`.

deploy.description: Azure deploy via federated identity (OIDC, no long-lived secrets): what-if preview, cosign verify gate behind `cosign`, output extraction + /health smoke test steered by network flags.

release.description: GHCR publish + cosign keyless signing + CycloneDX SBOM attestation + SLSA provenance attestation. Verbatim; no vars or flags.

fastapi-app.description: FastAPI app factory with ordered middleware stack (trusted host, size limit, optional CORS, request-id, security headers), prod-gated docs URLs, request-id log enrichment.

fastapi-request-id.description: Request-ID middleware: contextvar-bound UUID, sanitized client-supplied IDs, X-Request-ID response header, logging filter.

fastapi-security.description: Security headers middleware (nosniff, DENY, referrer/permissions policy, CSP behind `is_web_app`) + declared Content-Length 413 limiter.

fastapi-health.description: Liveness (/health, no dependency checks) and readiness (/ready, dependency probes) with the semantic distinction documented.

fastapi-exceptions.description: Sanitized exception handlers: full detail to logs with request-id, generic JSON bodies to clients, no stack traces or types leaked.

fastapi-auth-stub.description: Fail-loud auth dependency stub with model-specific implementation guidance; raises NotImplementedError, never a fake pass-through. Set exactly one auth_* flag.

axum-app.description: axum Router factory: catch-panic, request-id set/propagate, trace, trusted-host, declared+actual size limits, pinned CORS, security headers, CSP behind `is_web_app`.

axum-middleware.description: Trusted-host filter and declared Content-Length 413 limiter returning clean JSON errors.

axum-error.description: Sanitized error responses + structured 404 fallback carrying the request id.

axum-mod.description: HTTP module wiring; auth module included behind `has_auth`.

axum-auth-stub.description: Fail-loud auth extractor stub returning 501 with model-specific guidance. Set exactly one auth_* flag.
